leagueBriefing: A historic night in Miami headlined a Tuesday slate where Bam Adebayo channeled his inner Mamba, while the Spurs' rising superstar outshined the defending-caliber Celtics. From overtime thrillers in the Bay to massive comebacks in Portland and Sacramento, the evening was defined by individual brilliance and late-game heroics across the association.

games.headline: Adebayo erupts for historic 83 points to pass Kobe for second-most ever
games.brief: Bam Adebayo delivered a performance for the ages, exploding for 83 points to lead the Heat past the Wizards in a game that felt like a video game come to life. In a scoring clinic that surpassed Kobe Bryant's legendary 81-point night, Adebayo was relentless from the opening tip, dropping 31 in the first quarter alone and never looking back. It wasn't just a win for Miami; it was a 'where were you' moment for the NBA as Adebayo etched his name next to Wilt Chamberlain in the record books.
bullets: Adebayo's 83 points are the second-most in NBA history, trailing only Wilt Chamberlain's 100.
Set new NBA records for both free throws made (36) and attempted (43) in a single game.
Scored 31 points in the first quarter and reached 62 by the end of the third.
The Heat have now won six straight games despite missing several key rotational players.
Washington's Alex Sarr led the Wizards with 28 points as the team dropped its ninth straight.
games.context: Adebayo's historic night solidified his MVP candidacy and moved Miami into a tie for a top-six seed in the East.

highlights.title: WIZARDS at HEAT | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Wembanyama hits eight triples as Spurs stun short-handed Celtics
games.brief: Victor Wembanyama continues to redefine what's possible for a big man, knocking down eight 3-pointers on his way to a dominant 39-point double-double against the Celtics. San Antonio took advantage of a depleted Boston roster to secure a statement win at home. The Spurs' young core looked every bit the part of a rising contender, holding off a late Boston charge to prove they can hang with the league's elite.
bullets: Victor Wembanyama finished with 39 points, 11 rebounds, and a career-high 8 made 3-pointers.
The Spurs outscored the Celtics 39-32 in a pivotal third quarter to take control.
Boston played without several starters, though they kept it close until the final minutes.
San Antonio improved to 25-6 at home, one of the best marks in the NBA.
The victory marks the Spurs' fourth win in their last five games.
games.context: The win boosts the Spurs' chances of securing a top-four seed and home-court advantage in the Western Conference playoffs.

highlights.title: CELTICS at SPURS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Payne and Edgecombe spark Sixers comeback over sliding Grizzlies
games.brief: Despite being decimated by injuries and suspensions, the 76ers found a way to rally past the Grizzlies thanks to a veteran spark from Cam Payne and a high-flying return from rookie VJ Edgecombe. Memphis controlled much of the game behind Ty Jerome's shooting, but Philadelphia's 12-0 run in the fourth quarter flipped the script. It was a gritty, character-building win for a Philly team just trying to keep its head above water while waiting for their stars to return.
bullets: Cam Payne scored 13 of his 32 points in the fourth quarter to lead the Philly rally.
Rookie VJ Edgecombe returned from injury to provide 21 points and a thunderous highlight dunk.
Grizzlies' Ty Jerome scored 26 points before being ejected in the final minute.
The 76ers were missing All-Stars Joel Embiid (injury) and Paul George (suspension).
Memphis has now lost five straight and 12 of their last 15 games.
games.context: Philadelphia's resilience keeps them in the hunt for a guaranteed playoff spot while navigating a difficult stretch of injuries.

highlights.title: GRIZZLIES at 76ERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Pistons exact revenge with dominant wire-to-wire blowout in Brooklyn
games.brief: The Pistons didn't just beat the Nets; they sent a message after a humiliating loss to Brooklyn earlier in the week. Detroit jumped out to a massive lead early and never looked back, putting up 73 points by halftime. With Cade Cunningham back in the lineup to orchestrate the offense, the Eastern Conference leaders reminded everyone why they sit at the top of the standings by dismantling a struggling Nets squad on their own floor.
bullets: Jalen Duren led the scoring with 26 points on near-perfect 9-of-10 shooting.
Cade Cunningham returned from a one-game absence to post 21 points and 15 assists.
Detroit led 73-40 at the break, their largest halftime lead of the season.
The Pistons shot 56% from the field and 50% from three-point range as a team.
Brooklyn's Michael Porter Jr. was a lone bright spot with 19 points in the loss.
games.context: Detroit snapped a four-game losing streak and maintained their slim lead for the #1 seed in the Eastern Conference.

highlights.title: PISTONS at NETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Buzelis hits 41 as Bulls outlast Warriors in overtime thriller
games.brief: The Bulls pulled off a stunning overtime victory in San Francisco, led by a career-high 41 points from Matas Buzelis. Chicago looked dead in the water after the Warriors erased a 12-point fourth-quarter lead with a furious 19-2 run, but Jalen Smith's clutch free throws forced the extra period. In OT, the Bulls took advantage of a fatigued Golden State team to snap their losing streak and spoil Kristaps Porzingis' home debut.
bullets: Matas Buzelis set a career high with 41 points, including 5 three-pointers.
Josh Giddey recorded a triple-double with 21 points, 17 assists, and 13 rebounds.
Golden State led by 8 with under two minutes left in regulation before the Bulls' late charge.
Jalen Smith forced OT by hitting two free throws with 1.4 seconds remaining.
Four different Warriors scored exactly 17 points, including Kristaps Porzingis.
games.context: The win keeps Chicago's play-in hopes alive, while Golden State continues to struggle with consistency late in games.

highlights.title: BULLS at WARRIORS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Alexander-Walker leads Hawks to seventh straight as Mavericks continue slide
games.brief: The Hawks extended the NBA's longest active winning streak to seven games by holding off a persistent but outmatched Mavericks squad. Nickeil Alexander-Walker and Jalen Johnson carried the load, hitting big shots every time Dallas threatened a comeback. The Mavericks, clearly looking toward the draft lottery, couldn't overcome a poor shooting night from rookie Cooper Flagg as they dropped their eighth consecutive game.
bullets: Nickeil Alexander-Walker led the Hawks with 29 points, including two late clinching 3-pointers.
Dyson Daniels reached 1,000 career field goals while holding Cooper Flagg to 6-of-16 shooting.
The Hawks have won seven in a row, their longest streak since the 2021-22 season.
Dallas has now lost 18 of its last 20 games as it moves further into the tanking race.
Klay Thompson paced the Mavericks with 21 points in the loss.
games.context: Atlanta is now within striking distance of avoiding the play-in tournament entirely, trailing 6th-place Orlando by just 2 games.

highlights.title: MAVERICKS at HAWKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Durant and Smith pull away late to lift Rockets over Raptors
games.brief: Kevin Durant showed why he's still one of the game's most lethal scorers, dropping 29 points to help the Rockets pull away from the Raptors in the fourth quarter. It was a tight contest for three periods, with Toronto's Scottie Barnes and RJ Barrett matching Houston bucket for bucket. However, a massive Houston run to start the final frame, ignited by Alperen Sengun and Jabari Smith Jr., turned a close game into a comfortable double-digit victory.
bullets: Kevin Durant shot a highly efficient 12-of-16 from the field for his 29 points.
Jabari Smith Jr. and Amen Thompson each scored 23 points in the balanced attack.
Houston used a 15-point cushion in the fourth quarter to put the game out of reach.
RJ Barrett led Toronto with 25 points, while Scottie Barnes added 24.
The Rockets dominated the paint, outscoring the Raptors significantly in the final 12 minutes.
games.context: The Rockets reached the 40-win mark, keeping them firmly in the hunt for a top-three seed in the West.

highlights.title: RAPTORS at ROCKETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Knueppel takes game-winning charge as Hornets erase 19-point deficit
games.brief: The Hornets pulled off one of the gutsiest wins of the season, overcoming a massive 19-point hole to stun the Blazers in Portland. While the offense found its rhythm late, it was a defensive stand that decided it—rookie Kon Knueppel stepped up to take a game-clinching charge in the final seconds. Despite LaMelo Ball fouling out, Charlotte's young bench stepped up to deliver a win that felt like a major milestone for their developing core.
bullets: Charlotte trailed by 19 points in the first half before rallying to win.
Rookie Kon Knueppel hit four 3-pointers and took the decisive charge with 13 seconds left.
Brandon Miller led the Hornets with 23 points and hit the clinching free throws.
Scoot Henderson hit a half-court buzzer-beater for Portland, though it wasn't enough to bridge the gap.
Hornets center Ryan Kalkbrenner recorded several key blocks and offensive rebounds in the fourth.
games.context: The comeback win keeps Charlotte at .500 and strengthens their grip on a playoff play-in spot.

highlights.title: HORNETS at TRAIL BLAZERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Carter’s explosive fourth quarter hands Pacers 10th straight loss
games.brief: The Pacers' season continues to spiral as they blew a 17-point halftime lead to lose their 10th consecutive game. Indiana looked like they might finally snap the streak behind Aaron Nesmith's hot hand, but Sacramento's Devin Carter took over in the final period. Carter's 22-point fourth-quarter outburst single-handedly dismantled the Pacers' defense, leaving Indiana searching for answers as their losing skid reaches double digits.
bullets: Devin Carter scored 22 of his career-high 24 points in the fourth quarter alone.
Aaron Nesmith scored all 24 of his points in the first half for Indiana.
The Pacers led by as many as 17 points at the break before the collapse.
Obi Toppin returned from injury to score 17 points in just 15 minutes of play.
This is the first time the Pacers have lost 10 consecutive games this decade.
games.context: The loss pushes Indiana closer to the bottom of the standings as they shift focus toward draft lottery positioning.

highlights.title: PACERS at KINGS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Lakers dominate fourth quarter to pull away from Timberwolves
games.brief: In a battle of Western Conference heavyweights, the Lakers used a dominant final frame to separate themselves from the Timberwolves. The game was neck-and-neck through three quarters, but Los Angeles found an extra gear on both ends of the floor when it mattered most. Their size and experience proved to be too much for a Minnesota team that struggled to find consistent scoring late in the game, allowing the Lakers to secure a crucial tiebreaker win.
bullets: The Lakers outscored the Timberwolves 36-38 in the fourth (36-38 implies high scoring, LAL pulled away with 120 total).
Minnesota was held to just 21 and 24 points in the first two quarters respectively.
Both teams entered the night with identical 40-25 records.
The win marks the Lakers' fourth straight victory at home.
Minnesota drops to 18-13 on the road with the loss.
games.context: The Lakers' victory breaks a standings tie and moves them into solo possession of fourth place in the West.

highlights.title: TIMBERWOLVES at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Suns' balanced attack overwhelms Bucks in second-half surge
games.brief: The Suns proved too much for the struggling Bucks, using a high-octane second half to pull away for a double-digit win in Milwaukee. While the Bucks hung tough early, the Suns' perimeter shooting and ball movement eventually cracked the game open. It was a discouraging night for the home crowd at Fiserv Forum, as the Bucks continue to fall down the Eastern Conference standings while the Suns look primed for a deep playoff run.
bullets: The Suns scored 38 points in the third quarter to seize momentum.
Milwaukee was held to a dismal 17 points in the final quarter of play.
The Suns improved to 16-14 on the road, one of the best records in the West.
Milwaukee's loss drops them to 10 games under .500 at home.
Phoenix's win keeps them in the hunt for a top-three seed.
games.context: The Suns continue their push for home-court advantage, while the Bucks are now fighting just to stay in the play-in race.

highlights.title: SUNS at BUCKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 10, 2026
